heading: Suspension; Presidential authorization
label: 1515 Suspension; Presidential authorization
text: After , the operation of this section [, 1513–1515, 1517], or any portion thereof, may be suspended by the President during the period of any war declared by Congress and during the period of any national emergency declared by Congress or by the President.November 19, 1969150 U.S.C. 1512See References in Text note below.1
